name: data-pipeline
description: ETL workflow: extract → transform → load → validate

roles.description: Reads raw data sources, handles formats (CSV, JSON, API, DB), validates completeness
Cleans, normalizes, joins, aggregates data according to business rules
Writes to target format/location, validates schema, handles partitioning
Runs data quality checks end-to-end, compares input/output counts, spot-checks values

tasks.title: Read raw data sources, validate completeness and format
Clean, normalize, join, and aggregate data per business rules
Write to target format/location, validate schema, handle partitioning
Run data quality checks, compare input/output counts, spot-check values
